expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the case focus and analyzes it: "Case focus (checkpoint enforcement, advisory): the review loop does not silently drop evidence-backed nodes" and ties it to a concrete evidence-backed node (BCIN-7709 / multiple confirmation dialogs) plus the Phase 5a contract requirement for a "Coverage Preservation Audit" and acceptance gate.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase5a
expectations.evidence: result.md is Phase-5a-centered throughout: it declares "Primary phase under test: Phase 5a", summarizes Phase 5a contractual requirements (review_notes Coverage Preservation Audit; review_delta accept/return phase5a gate), and evaluates missing Phase 5a runtime artifacts (review_notes/review_delta/qa_plan_phase5a drafts) as the reason it cannot be demonstrated in this retrospective evidence set.
